shortRoleReason: Central role driving business and administrative efficiency
companySummary: Evergreen Foster Care is a growing fostering agency focused on changing lives for children and families through forward-thinking care services.
roleSummary: The Business Manager will lead business and administrative functions, supporting senior leaders to ensure smooth and compliant agency operations.
headlineAttraction: Opportunity to make a real impact in a growing fostering agency
rolePurpose: To oversee and coordinate the business and administrative functions that keep the fostering agency running efficiently.
probablePriorities: Manage HR, payroll and finance functions
advertSummary: Evergreen Foster Care seeks a driven Business Manager to oversee HR, finance, IT, facilities, compliance and administrative support. The role includes supervising staff, managing payroll, supporting fostering panels, and acting as a key point of contact for stakeholders.
companyPridePoints: Changing lives for children and families
coreResponsibilities: Lead business and administrative functions including HR, finance, IT, facilities, and compliance
Support Registered Manager, Responsible Individual, and Directors
Manage HR processes, safer recruitment, and employee records
Process payroll and foster carer payments
Oversee office operations, meetings, and training coordination
Coordinate fostering panels and take minutes
Support social workers with essential administrative tasks
Act as key point of contact for stakeholders, carers, and external partners
essentialRequirements: Proven experience in a business or senior administrative role
Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams)
Experience with payroll systems such as SAGE
Excellent organisational skills and attention to detail
Confident communicator with professional and empathetic approach
Proactive, independent and team-oriented working style

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I am excited to apply for the Business Manager role at Evergreen Foster Care, where my experience leading operations and delivering measurable results can directly support a purpose-driven mission. I thrive in fast-paced settings where structure, compliance, and clear reporting are essential.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: I am drawn to Evergreen Foster Care because of its focus on building brighter futures for children and families. The agency’s growth and purpose-led approach align perfectly with my desire to contribute to an organisation where my work has visible impact.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role suits my background in operational management, financial control, and team coordination. I enjoy creating efficient processes that support compliance, enable teams to perform, and ensure leadership has the insight needed to drive results.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Operational Turnaround in NHS Primary Care
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Shows my ability to stabilise and improve complex operations while ensuring compliance and financial oversight.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Improved patient experience scores and delivered £149.9k profit uplift.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Highlights my experience managing teams, payroll and compliance across operational functions.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Led day-to-day operations supporting 60% order growth and margin lift.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: My background in operations, service improvement, and financial control positions me strongly to manage the business functions of Evergreen Foster Care. I bring structure, a results focus, and the ability to support leadership and frontline teams alike.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: I would ensure that HR, payroll, compliance and office processes run smoothly, freeing leadership to focus on care outcomes. My focus on reliable reporting and efficient coordination will help the agency maintain high standards as it grows.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I thrive in structured yet fast-moving environments where taking ownership and delivering results make a real difference.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would welcome the opportunity to contribute my operational and administrative expertise to your team.
contentNotes: Company detail in advert is limited

examples.title: Operational Turnaround in NHS Primary Care
